positive: A celestial forest dreamscape. Giant, luminous bioluminescent flora with exaggerated, stylized leaves in shades of sapphire, emerald, and gold. Several gracefully flowing, stylized mountain spirits (kami-like, non-humanoid) hover among the canopies. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring a path or open area suitable for text overlay. Style is intricate Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Art Nouveau engraving, rendered with bold, clean lines, strong contrasts, and deep jewel-toned color saturation. Soft ambient glow emanating from the plants, volumetric lighting, highly detailed, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, ugly, cropped, multiple figures, disfigured, extra limbs, noise, grainy, messy, sketch, grayscale
